case_title: CAMERON MATTHEWS et al VS. ANDREW CRAWFORD et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, ANDREW
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, ANDREW JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, ANDREW SIMPSON, GRANT

DISCOVERY 612, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED, MODIFIED TO DROP THE SANCTIONS AWARD: PLAINTIFFS CAMERON MATTHEWS, JOSHUA FEINERMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH PROMISES TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS BY DEFENDANT ANDREW CRAWFORD IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS AN ADDITIONAL RESPONSE TO FORM INTERROGATORY NUMBER 12.1 AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NUMBER 85. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE RESPONSES MUST COMPLY WITH THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE AS IT REQUIRES DILIGENT SEARCH AND REASONABLE INQUIRY. THE FAILURE TO RESPOND FULLY WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
Andrew Collier, Esq. for and with the Plaintiffs: Cameron Matthews and Joshua Feinerman, were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted DefendantGrant Simpson as follows:
Total General Damages $500,000.00
Total Special Damages $79,800.66
Total Punitive Damages $584,000.00
Total Attorney's Fees $46,200.00
Total Costs $1,266.44 and Interest on the Judgment as provided by law.
Judgment signed in open court.

Off Calendar Jun-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Thomas O'Brien, , Esq., appeared for Defendant and opposing party: Andrew Crawford
No appearance stated by plaintiff.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED, modified to drop the sanctions award: Plaintiffs Cameron Matthews, Joshua Feinerman's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And To Compel Compliance With Promises To Produce Documents By Defendant Andrew Crawford is granted as it seeks an additional response to Form Interrogatory Number 12.1 and Special Interrogatory Number 85. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. The responses must comply with the Code Of Civil Procedure as it requires diligent search and reasonable inquiry.
The failure to respond fully was a misuse of the discovery process. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
